item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Machinist's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned machinist─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level machinist to 70 and complete all job quests up through “The Mongrel and the Knight.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
